targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        ds.ts_datetime,
        ds.total_items,
        ds.good_read
    FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
    JOIN dbo.devices d
        ON d.id = ds.device_id
    WHERE (
        ${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__'
        OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring}
    )
),
bounds AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AS day_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AS day_end,

        DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AS month_start,
        DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) AS month_end,

        DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1) AS year_start,
        DATEADD(YEAR, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1)) AS year_end
)
SELECT
    -- Year
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.year_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.year_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0)
        AS year_total_parcels,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.year_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.year_end THEN b.good_read ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.year_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.year_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0),
            0
        ) AS decimal(6,2)
    ) AS year_good_read_pct,

    -- Month
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.month_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.month_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0)
        AS month_total_parcels,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.month_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.month_end THEN b.good_read ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.month_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.month_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0),
            0
        ) AS decimal(6,2)
    ) AS month_good_read_pct,

    -- Day
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.day_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.day_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0)
        AS day_total_parcels,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.day_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.day_end THEN b.good_read ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ts_datetime >= bo.day_start AND b.ts_datetime < bo.day_end THEN b.total_items ELSE 0 END), 0),
            0
        ) AS decimal(6,2)
    ) AS day_good_read_pct
FROM base b
CROSS JOIN bounds bo;

list.definition:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 'All' AS __text, '__ALL__' AS __value
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.customer AS __text,
        d.customer AS __value
    FROM dbo.devices d
) v
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN v.__value = '__ALL__' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    v.__value;
list.description: Select the customer you wish to view.
list.label: Customer
list.name: tenant
list.query:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 'All' AS __text, '__ALL__' AS __value
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.customer AS __text,
        d.customer AS __value
    FROM dbo.devices d
) v
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN v.__value = '__ALL__' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    v.__value;
